headline: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
summary: OpenAI proposed giving the US government a 5% ownership stake. This move aims to ease tensions with the Trump administration. The company also seeks to blunt mounting public backlash against AI.

headline: Amazon has enough satellites to launch its Starlink competitor
summary: Amazon now has 396 Leo satellites deployed in low-Earth orbit. This fulfills the requirement for continuous service across initial latitudes. The company is set to launch its Starlink internet competitor.

headline: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
summary: Apple is reportedly working on a "revamped" entry-level MacBook Pro. This redesigned model could launch as early as the first half of 2027. Four new iPad Pros are also being tested for a spring release.

headline: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
summary: Sony will stop making physical discs for new PlayStation games from January 2028. This decision is lamented by gamers and retailers due to loss of choice. Concerns are raised about the future of game preservation.

headline: Onimusha: Way of the Sword Release Date Moved Forward
summary: Capcom has announced an earlier release date for Onimusha: Way of the Sword. The action-adventure sequel will now be available on September 4. It launches across PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 2.

headline: The $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is $380 During the Wayfair 4th of July Sale
summary: An $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair is heavily discounted. It is currently available for just $380. This significant deal is part of the Wayfair 4th of July Sale.

headline: Marvel Super Heroes Comes to Magic: The Gathering
summary: Marvel Super Heroes are being introduced to Magic: The Gathering. This collaboration brings iconic characters to the popular card game. It is being explored as a potential entry point for new players.

headline: Marvel Refused to Tell Sadie Sink About Her Spider-Man: Brand New Day Character Until Filming Started
summary: Sadie Sink's character in Spider-Man: Brand New Day was kept top secret. Marvel withheld details from the actress until filming commenced in London. She reportedly did not see the script before production began.

headline: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum
summary: A people smuggler convicted in France has been located by the BBC in the UK. Described as the "godfather" of French migrant camps, he is now living in Leicestershire. The individual is reportedly seeking asylum while working illegally.

headline: Watch: People smuggler tracked down and confronted by BBC
summary: The BBC tracked down and confronted a convicted people smuggler. He is currently living in Leicestershire and seeking asylum in the UK. The individual is alleged to be working illegally.

headline: At least 18 killed in 'most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv
summary: Kyiv experienced its "most massive" Russian attack, resulting in at least 18 deaths. The city's mayor declared a day of mourning. This follows a devastating assault on the capital.

headline: Victims of forced adoption to get formal apology after years campaigning
summary: Victims of forced adoption are set to receive a formal apology. This comes after years of persistent campaigning efforts. Thousands of babies were taken from their mothers between 1949 and 1976.
